Video.summary: A hotshot Australian pilot seeks a position at Buffalo Airways.
Video.title: Aussie Ace

Video.summary: David feels Devan's wrath; Will issues an ultimatum to the company; Rod and Corey visit the U.K.
Video.title: Rock Stars and Rampies

Video.summary: Mikey springs into action when the Electra becomes grounded after a freak accident.
Video.title: Frozen Solid

Video.summary: Joe travels to England to obtain a new aircraft; a crisis grounds the Electra.
Video.title: Power Crash

Video.summary: Graeme's first landing in the Electra does not go well; Chris wants a seat in the C-46.
Video.title: Breakdown

Video.summary: Devan prepares for fire season; Joe and Mikey witness the end of an era in aviation.
Video.title: Target Practice

Video.summary: Highlights from five years of the series; recollections from the Buffalo crew.
Video.title: Five Seasons

Video.summary: Buffalo struggles to make its Christmas deliveries; Prefkar Mony copes with life in the North.
Video.title: A Ball O'Snags

Video.summary: Buffalo's Electra aircraft gets hit with high winds; a rookie crew faces a terrible ice storm.
Video.title: Ice Storm

Video.summary: Engine trouble plagues Buffalo's newest plane; a standoff threatens to close the airline.
Video.title: Old Dogs

Video.summary: Jeff almost runs off of the runway; Prefkar learns how to play hockey.
Video.title: Second Chances

Video.summary: Mickey gets Buffalo involved in a D-Day paratrooper jump; Prefkar escapes courier duty.
Video.title: Big Plans, Bad Luck

Video.summary: Buffalo's top guns, rookies, and vets go to California for aerial dogfights in real fighter planes.
Video.title: Dogfight

Video.summary: Joe refuses to fly his DC-3 into the drop zone, threatening Mikey's D-Day tribute parachute jump.
Video.title: D-Day

Video.summary: Christmas is just around the corner, but Buffalo's crucial food and mail runs come to a halt.
Video.title: Pre-Christmas Rush

Video.summary: Arnie runs into a string of bad luck on his birthday run, threatening his naughty birthday surprise.
Video.title: Birthday from Hell

Video.summary: Justin delivers a generator when a power failure exposes Rankin Inlet to the northern elements.
Video.title: A Big Deal

Video.summary: Cory races to turn two water bombers into trans-Atlantic aircraft for the journey to Turkey.
Iron Maiden lead singer Bruce Dickinson pilots Buffalo's planes; Mikey flies in a CF-18 fighter jet.
Video.title: Turkey or Bust

Video.summary: David and Jeff deal with a troublesome landing-gear light; Buffalo's hockey team plays NHL stars.
Video.title: Shootout

Video.summary: Al has a mishap on the runway; the boys are stuck in Turkey with a water bomber.
Video.title: Snowplane

Video.summary: Devan encounters gear difficulties when he transports a DC-3; frigid weather creates problems.
Video.title: Gear Lock

Video.summary: Chuck clashes with the Air Force; Mikey takes lessons in High Arctic survival.
Video.title: Ice Camp

Video.summary: Joe takes to the air with the Snowbirds; the company is shaken by a sudden departure.
Video.title: Air Show

Video.summary: Joe goes for medical testing in Arizona; Jeff and Sam stress over their check flights.
Video.title: Checkflight

Video.summary: Life at Buffalo Airways; a co-pilot's emergency landing; the boss' son is in hot water.
Video.title: Buffalo Air

Video.summary: The team contends with a landing-gear collapse and a frozen DC-4 that cannot get airborne.
Video.title: Cold Start
